Package recoder.java.declaration

Class FieldSpecification

java.lang.Object
recoder.java.JavaSourceElement
recoder.java.JavaProgramElement
recoder.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
recoder.java.declaration.VariableSpecification
recoder.java.declaration.FieldSpecification
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Cloneable, Field, Member, ProgramModelElement, Variable, AccessFlags, Declaration, ExpressionContainer, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, SourceElement, ModelElement, NamedModelElement
Direct Known Subclasses:
EnumConstantSpecification
public class FieldSpecification extends VariableSpecification implements Field
